creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
Update to lyx 1.0.3.  I removed the ONLY_FOR_ARCHS= i386 because steve recently
added xforms for FreeBSD/alpha.  I have no idea if it works though.

files removed: patch-aa

Fix: 

-Chris--pYRApSnnKDWnLTkBDcAbmzCeavGnjmg7Vq674ZTCfoIV3O98
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: lyx/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /cvs/FreeBSD/ports/print/lyx/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.29
diff -u -r1.29 Makefile
--- Makefile	1999/05/05 14:09:34	1.29
+++ Makefile	1999/06/03 20:09:47
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	lyx
-# Version required:	1.0.2
+# Version required:	1.0.3
 # Date created:		Sa  12 Okt 1996 19:20:51 MET DST
 # Whom:			Andreas Klemm <andreas@klemm.gtn.com>
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.29 1999/05/05 14:09:34 flathill Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	lyx-1.0.2
+DISTNAME=	lyx-1.0.3
 CATEGORIES=	print
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.lyx.org/pub/lyx/stable/ \
 		ftp://la1ad.uio.no/pub/lyx/ \
@@ -22,9 +22,6 @@
 .endif
 LIB_DEPENDS=	xforms.0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/xforms \
 		Xpm.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/xpm
-
-# depends on xforms
-ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386
 
 USE_PERL5=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes

+++ md5	1999/06/03 19:37:47

-MD5 (lyx-1.0.2.tar.gz) = fb1ba5950f11c239a7311e6e8c33be6b
+MD5 (lyx-1.0.3.tar.gz) = c7a8191795160de3a138a66041dc8de6
Index: lyx/patches/patch-aa
===================================================================
RCS file: patch-aa
diff -N patch-aa
--- /tmp/cvsr43112	Thu Jun  3 13:09:50 1999
+++ /dev/null	Thu Jun  3 13:07:11 1999
@@ -1,12 +0,0 @@
---- src/filetools.C 1999/02/11 14:46:11     1.2
-+++ src/filetools.C 1999/05/07 13:09:00     1.3
-@@ -517,7 +517,7 @@
- 		delete[] with_drive;
- #endif
- 	} else
--		TempBase = safer_getcwd();
-+		TempBase = GetCWD(); //safer_getcwd();
- #ifdef __EMX__
- 	if (AbsolutePath(TempRel))
- 		return TempBase.substring(0,1) + TempRel;
-
